body_txt: Sometimes, while watching a favorite movie or TV show, you might notice some new details that you mgiht have missed on a first atch. Those are normally Rewatch Bonus , where you see something new that enhances the story. Sometimes, you might see a computer screen and pause to see what's on it. Often it turns out to be a joke or a Shout-Out , though it can sometimes be used for Foreshadowing in more continuity-heavy works. These are the Freeze Frames, frames of a movie you deliberately need to pause at to see. Unreadably Fast Text is a subtrope of this. Also called a "Blink And You'll Miss It" moment. (If you can, please try to link to photos of the frame or give as much info about the frame as you can when adding examples for this trope) Compare Easter Egg , Blipvert , Subliminal Seduction (when it happens in-story) and If You Can Read This .
